# requirements-core.txt  (RECOMMENDED — generated by DEPENDENCY_AUDIT.md, not yet wired into CI/deploy)
# Minimal set proven REACHABLE at runtime: boot + main REST API + WebSockets + Celery +
# PDF/Excel generation + 2FA/security + analytics. Direct deps only; pip resolves transitives.
#
# Install:  pip install -r requirements-core.txt

# --- Web framework / API ---
Django==5.2.9
djangorestframework==3.16.1
django-cors-headers==4.9.0
django-filter==25.2
djangorestframework-simplejwt==5.5.1
pyjwt==2.10.1
drf-spectacular==0.29.0

# --- Config / DB ---
python-decouple==3.8
psycopg2-binary==2.9.11

# --- Realtime / async / cache ---
channels==4.3.2
channels-redis==4.3.0
redis==7.1.0
celery==5.6.1
django-celery-beat==2.8.1
django-celery-results==2.6.0
django-timezone-field==7.2.1
msgpack==1.1.2

# --- Documents (PDF/Excel/images) ---
reportlab==4.4.7
weasyprint==67.0
openpyxl==3.1.5
Pillow==12.1.0
qrcode==8.2

# --- Analytics (numpy: eager top-level import in URLconf-reachable modules) ---
numpy==2.2.6

# --- Security / utils ---
cryptography==46.0.3
pyotp==2.9.0
python-magic==0.4.27
user-agents==2.2.0
psutil==7.2.1

# --- Email automation scheduling ---
python-crontab==3.3.0
cron-descriptor==2.0.6

# --- HTTP / dates ---
requests==2.32.5
python-dateutil==2.9.0.post0
pytz==2025.2

# --- Servers / packaging ---
gunicorn==23.0.0
uvicorn==0.40.0
setuptools==80.9.0

# whitenoise is currently NOT wired into settings.MIDDLEWARE (see DEPENDENCY_AUDIT.md).
# Keep it ONLY if you also add WhiteNoiseMiddleware; otherwise it is inert.
